prestazioni: Engine swap to a modernized BMW M54B30 (3.0L I6) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a custom Schrick 272° camshaft profile for high-lift, long-duration performance, retaining the original 507's dual-Solex 40 PHH carburetors but upgraded with velocity stacks and a custom intake manifold for optimized airflow

Installation of a custom-built stainless steel exhaust system by Remus, featuring 2.5-inch mandrel-bent piping, a straight-through design with minimal backpressure, and a pair of hand-fabricated quad tips styled after the original 507's rear valance, incorporating a secondary bypass valve for adjustable sound levels

Suspension overhaul with a custom-fabricated KW Variant 3 coilover kit, modified to fit the 507's unique chassis geometry, featuring adjustable compression and rebound damping, along with polyurethane bushings from SuperPro for improved handling and longevity, paired with a reinforced front sway bar from Hotchkis for reduced body roll
estetica: Full custom bodywork restoration with hand-formed aluminum panels by RML Group, retaining the original 507's iconic curves while incorporating subtle modern reinforcements, including a carbon fiber hood with functional NACA ducts for improved engine bay cooling and a bespoke front splitter with integrated LED turn signals

Interior reupholstery using Bridge of Weir leather in a custom two-tone scheme (black and tan), featuring period-correct diamond-stitching patterns, a modernized dashboard with a digital instrument cluster from a BMW i8 (retained in a vintage-style housing), and a custom center console integrating a hidden wireless charging pad and a retro-styled Bluetooth audio system by RetroSound

Custom 16-inch wheel setup with bespoke three-piece alloys by BBS (RS-GT style), featuring a staggered fitment (6.5J front, 7.5J rear) with polished lips and gold centers, wrapped in period-correct Michelin XWX tires (185/80R16 front, 205/70R16 rear) for an authentic yet performance-oriented stance
